notes: Current main is v1.9.2. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). Issues #10 and #12/#13: CI caching and Dependabot config PRs blocked by GitHub Actions .github/ permission. Issue #1: auth-failure, no longer actionable. PR #14 (BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS) rebased onto v1.9.2 on 2026-04-29. PR #19: docs README rewrite. PR #20: test hyphenated attr. PR #21: getItemsPage cursor pagination. FUTURE WORK: updateItem edge case — when all values in updates are undefined, hasUpdates is truthy but SET expression is empty → invalid UpdateExpression. deleteItem fix merged into PR #22 but ReturnConsumedCapacity was already fixed in PR #4 title but not ReturnValues.
